Drop-in UI Customization Interfaces

The following interfaces are used with Xbox Drop-in UI customization.

Interface Description
IPluginSupport Provides support methods to custom ITitleUIPlugin plug-ins. UI plug-ins use these support methods to obtain skin file resources and to perform word-wrapping.
ITitleAudioPlugin The audio plug-in interface. The engine calls methods on this interface to provide sound for the user interface. Titles can provide their own implementation or use the default audio plug-in obtained with UIXCreateAudioPlugin.
ITitleFontRenderer The font rendering plug-in interface. The engine calls methods on this interface to render text for the user interface. Titles can provide their own implementation or use the default font rendering plug-in obtained with UIXCreateFontRenderer.
ITitleUIPlugin The UI plug-in interface. The engine calls ITitleUIPlugin methods to provide user interface elements and interaction. Titles can provide their own implementation or use the default UI plug-in obtained with UIXCreateUIPlugin.
